description: Retro themed light pink shoe with frilly details, the block heel adds a hint of grown-up glam to this sweet and girly shoe. Work the 70's vintage aesthetic with a lacy pair of socks and pastel tones in your ensemble.Heel: 2"UpperPink leather upper with a midfoot strapBuckle closure on the strapSoft footbed with brand patch at the heelOutsoleDurable TPU outsole grooved at the heel with a block heelShoe careClean the upper using a suede brushDo not store in direct sunlight
